hooks.command: git pull --ff-only 2>&1 || true; COUNT=$(gh pr list --assignee @me --json number --jq 'length' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$COUNT" -gt 0 ] && echo "Open PRs assigned to you ($COUNT):" && gh pr list --assignee @me 2>/dev/null; true
hooks.statusMessage: Pulling latest voiceprint and checking PRs…
